en: A: I forgot to bring my pen.
I can lend you.
A: I forgot to bring my chopsticks.

ab: ini cu aray uyi, hata mes ha.
en: B: I don’t have one either, let’s go buy one.
A: Let’s go buy a pen, shall we?

ab: uya ga, pbes cu ccom loyi.
en: B: Well, I still have to buy erasers.
A: Let’s go get breakfast, shall we?

ab: iyat cu, mnaniq cu muyax la.
en: B: No, I’ve already eaten at home.

ab: kngyan mu skilux sibing mu la.
en: A: I forgot to steam my lunchbox.
B: Take it to the heat!

ab: kngyan mu maray sibing mu la.
en: A: I forgot to bring my lunchbox.

ab: squn ta maniq sibing mu lga!
ch: B:那我們一起吃我的便當吧!
en: B: Then let’s eat my lunch box together!
A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: pqaniq cu nhapuy ni pqwasan biru qani.
ch: B:我要吃學校的營養午餐。
en: B: I want a nutritious school lunch.
A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: nyan cu maray sibing coni, squn ta maniq knryax ki!
ch: B:我今天有帶便當，我們中午一起吃吧!
en: B: I’ve brought a lunchbox today, let’s eat together at noon!
A: Let’s go play basketball, shall we?
B: Okay! Let’s go.
A: Shall we go play baseball?
B: No, I want to study.
A: Please help me with the broom.
B: Okay, here’s a broomstick for you.

ab: biqi cu cikay tapan qaca ha ga?
en: A: Can you help me with the cloth?

ab: nyan cu cmapuh mwani, kayan cikay Kacu pragay su nya miq.
en: B: I’m sweeping the floor and you asked Kacu to carry it for you.
A: Are you done sweeping?
B: I swept it.
A: Why don’t you clean up?
B: I’ve finished cleaning up.

ab: claq calay qa phlan ta roq qani, hali cmong cikay.
en: A: The floor is dirty, go clean it.

ab: uya, haqa cu magan tapan ha.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go get the cloth.

ab: claq calay qa tubun qaca, hali cmong cikay.
ch: A:那個窗戶很髒，去擦一下。
en: A: That window is very dirty, go clean it.

ab: ini na cikay, ini mu suqi cmapuh cqani na.
ch: B:等一下，我還沒掃完這裡。
en: B: Wait a minute, I’m not done sweeping here yet.
A: What are you doing later?
B: I’m going to see my teacher.

ab: masoq su mqwas biru lga, nanu iyaw ptiyawun su?
en: A: What do you do after school?

ab: musa cu msqun mqwas qwas ki rangi mu.
en: B: I’m going to sing with my friends.

ab: masoq mqwas biru hiya lga, nanu iyaw ptiyawun nya la?
en: A: What’s he doing after school?
B: He’s going swimming.
